coverage.forecastRange: No auditable group-wide annual revenue or net-income forecast retained
coverage.availabilityNote: FY2016-FY2024 are official QatarEnergy/Qatar Petroleum group annual actuals converted from QAR. An FY2025 public group annual review was not located as of the update date, so it is not estimated or shown.

metrics.fxMethod: Divide by fixed QAR 3.64 per USD
metrics.basis: QatarEnergy consolidated annual-review summary financial statements reported in QAR and converted at Qatar Central Bank's fixed parity of QR3.64 per USD. Capex is acquisition of property, plant and equipment; FCF is derived as CFO plus capex.
metrics.verificationNote: Official QatarEnergy/Qatar Petroleum annual-review summary consolidated financial statements, audited as stated in the report, were used for FY2016-FY2024. QAR figures are converted at the Qatar Central Bank fixed QR3.64 per USD parity. FCF is derived as CFO plus capex.

profitability.title: Revenue and Net Income
profitability.subtitle: USD million
profitability.note: Official consolidated annual disclosures; no forecast series retained.

cashInvestment.title: Investments and Free Cash Flow
cashInvestment.titleCn: QatarEnergy 投资与自由现金流
cashInvestment.subtitle: USD million
cashInvestment.basisLabel: Cash capex / investment proxy and derived FCF
cashInvestment.note: Investment bars show capex cash outflows. FCF equals operating cash flow plus capex.

definitions.definition: Group consolidated annual revenue, using the line item labelled Revenue or Sales in the source disclosure.
Group consolidated profit or loss for the year, including non-controlling interests where presented in the consolidated statement.
Net cash from operating activities in the consolidated annual cash-flow statement.
Derived consistently as operating cash flow plus the normalized negative capex value; it is not asserted to be the company's separately reported non-GAAP FCF.
Cash acquisition or purchase of productive assets / PPE and related capital assets where disclosed. It is stored as a negative cash outflow and displayed as a positive investment bar.
Cash and cash equivalents at end of year from the consolidated cash-flow statement, converted at QR3.64 per USD.
QAR amounts are divided by Qatar Central Bank's fixed parity of QR3.64 per USD.

sources.title: QatarEnergy Annual Review 2024
sources.notes: Official annual review including audited summary consolidated financial statements.

sources.title: Qatar Central Bank Monetary Policy Tools - QAR/USD Fixed Parity
sources.notes: QCB states the fixed parity of QR3.64 per USD. QAR figures are divided by 3.64.
